ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Vital status
Notes: 1=Alive; 2=Dead; 999=Unknown

ElementDescription: Site Name - This is the institution or geographical location where subjects for the given site ID are being collected. A Site Name can have more than one Site ID.
Days since baseline
Case control indicator
Notes: 1=Case; 2=Control; 999=Unknown

ElementDescription: General notes text
Language form administration ISO code
Notes: 1=chi (Chinese); 2=cze (Czech); 3=dan (Danish); 4=dut (Dutch); 5=eng (English); 6=fin (Finnish); 7=fre (French); 8=ger (German); 9=gre (Greek); 10=heb (Hebrew); 11=hin (Hindi); 12=hun(Hungarian); 13=ira (Iranian Languages); 14=ita (Italian); 15=jpn (Japanese); 16= nor (Norwegian); 17=por (Portuguese); 18=rus (Russian); 19=sgn (Sign language); 20=spa (Spanish); 21=vie (Vietnamese); 444=Other, specify (Other specify)

ElementDescription: Language form administration ISO code other please specify:
Context type
Notes: 0=After injury; 1=At time of assessment; 2=Before injury; 3=Last 24 hours; 4=Last 2 weeks; 5= Last 6 months; 6=Last month; 7=Last week; 8=Last year; 9=Prior to death 10=Since the last interview; 11=Time of injury; 12=Other, please specify

ElementDescription: Context type other please specify:
Data source
Notes: 1= Brother; 2= Chart/Medical record; 3= Daughter; 4= Father; 5= Friend; 6= Mother; 7= Other family, specify relation; 8= Participant/subject; 9= Physician; 10= Sister; 11= Son; 12= Spouse; 999= Unknown; 777= Other, specify

ElementDescription: Data source- Other family, specify relation
Data source other please specify:
BRICS data completeness index
Data captured by type
Notes: 1= Participant/subject self-rated; 2= Automatic sensor/device (e.g. lab test, EEG, ECG, ICP monitoring, etc.); 3= Computerized assessment; 4= Participant/subject self-rated and medical professional monitored (Data input by participant/subject and was monitored by medical professional (nurse, physician, clinician, etc.)); 5= Participant/subject self-rated with parent/guardian input (Data input by the participant/subject self-rated as well as rated by the parent/guardian); 6= Parent/guardian/caregiver rated; 7= Medical professional rated; 8= Medical professional interview (Interview conducted by a medical professional); 9= Research assistant interview (Interview conducted by a research assistant); 10= N/A; 444= Other, specify; 999= Unknown
